final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] count
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 5'b00000;
        end else begin
            count <= {count[3:0], ~count[4]};
        end
    end
endmodule
